caption: The video appears to be a segment from a political discussion show titled "Plus Politics" on PlusTV, focusing on a statement made by Bola Tinubu that "Nigeria Needs Me." The host, dressed in a suit and tie, is seated in a studio with a backdrop featuring a world map and the show's logo. He is engaged in conversation, gesturing with his hands as he speaks. On the right side of the screen, there is an inset image of Olusola Oyekanmi, a political analyst based in Lagos, who is participating via phone. The lower third of the screen displays the show's title, the topic being discussed, and information on how viewers can watch the broadcast online or on specific TV channels. The overall setting suggests a formal and informative discussion on current political issues in Nigeria.
